inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Entity ID or Name (optional)
inputs.description: Leave empty to validate the entire database. Connect an entity ID/name to validate a single entity.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Report (JSON)
outputs.description: Validation report with total, ok, errors and issues list.

outputs.name: errors
outputs.label: Errors
outputs.description: Entities with at least one error.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Node Error
outputs.description: Non-empty only if the node itself failed.

properties.label: Entity ID / Name
properties.placeholder: Fallback when 'in' port is empty — blank = whole DB
